    1. makeSound(int)

Interface MakeSoundAble

All Known Implementing Classes:
BackBotton, BaseMenuButton, DifficultyButton, QuitButton, SlimePane, StartGameButton, StevePane, WinLossAlertPane
public interface MakeSoundAble
Interface for objects that can produce sound effects. Defines sound resource paths and a method to play sounds by selector index.

  • Method Details

    • makeSound

      void makeSound(int selector)
      Plays a sound effect based on the provided selector index. Sound indices:
      • 0 - Walk/footstep sound
      • 1 - Jump sound
      • 2 - Hurt/damage sound
      • 3 - Button press/menu sound
      • 4 - Slime-related sound
      • 5 - Win/victory sound
      Parameters:
      selector - index of the sound to play (0-5)
